steps.title: Identify the question type
steps.content: This is a word-in-context question. The phrase after the colon — "present yet having essentially no effect on our bodily processes" — defines exactly what the blank must mean.

steps.title: Reason toward the answer
steps.content: We need a word that means "present but inactive." Dormant precisely captures this idea of something existing in an inactive or sleeping state.

steps.title: Eliminate the wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'decisive': means having a major effect, which contradicts "having essentially no effect." ✗
  • Choice B — 'lacking': means absent or missing, which contradicts "present." ✗
  • Choice C — 'variable': means changing or inconsistent, but the text describes a steady state of inactivity, not variation. ✗
That matches choice D — D is correct.
